close_reason: already implemented in 3125fc9; reopened accidentally during later investigation
description:
Implement the post-worker orchestration pass that turns a completed delegated worker into a known terminal outcome.

Scope:
- run an orchestrator-controlled validation pass after worker completion
- confirm the delegated worktree is landable
- if landing is blocked by drift, drive an update/rebase flow so the work can be landed cleanly
- run required project quality gates before declaring completion
- if checks pass, land the worktree and fully close down the worker/worktree lifecycle
- if checks fail or landing is not possible, surface an explicit blocked/needs-attention state to the operator

Goal: no more 'worker exited and a human has to infer what to do next from pending review text'.
title: Auto-validate, rebase if needed, land, and clean up delegated worktrees
